title: iMessage feedback on Brotein protein-streak icon design
html:
A friend reviewing Yahir's brotein icon mockups in iMessage (Sat–Mon thread): prefers option two, flags that the icon doesn't read as "protein goal," nudges Yahir to validate WCAG AA/AAA contrast via the WebAIM contrast checker. Yahir thanks him, asks for the method.

TL;DR

  • brotein social feature pitched as friend-visible daily-protein streaks; icon design under peer review in Sept-2025.
  • Reviewer cites WCAG AA/AAA and WebAIM contrast checker as the gate Yahir hadn't run.
  • "Minimalist style" liked but readability-of-purpose flagged — early signal that the brotein visual identity needs an icon-language pass before launch.

brotein · wcag contrast accessibility · webaim contrast checker · ios · design feedback loop
